description: Sistema di Fatturazione Internazionale - Web app self-hosted per gestione fatturazione autónomo spagnolo con IVA internazionale

userStories.title: Initialize Next.js project with Docker and Prisma
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to set up the Next.js project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, and Docker Compose for PostgreSQL.
acceptanceCriteria: Next.js project initialized with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
Prisma installed and configured with PostgreSQL datasource
Docker Compose file with PostgreSQL service and app service
Basic project structure with src/app directory
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use Next.js 14+ with App Router. PostgreSQL in Docker on port 5432.

userStories.title: Create Prisma schema for core entities
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the database schema for Company, Client, Supplier, TaxRate, Invoice, InvoiceLine, CreditNote, Quote, PurchaseInvoice, and Expense.
acceptanceCriteria: Prisma schema includes Company model (name, nif, address, country, email, phone, iban, taxRegime)
Prisma schema includes Client model (name, vatNumber, fiscalCode, address, country, email, currency, vatRegime, deleted flag)
Prisma schema includes Supplier model (name, vatNumber, address, country, email, expenseCategory, deleted flag)
Prisma schema includes TaxRate model (name, rate, country, type)
Prisma schema includes Invoice model (number, clientId, date, dueDate, status, currency, exchangeRate, lines relation)
Prisma schema includes InvoiceLine model (description, quantity, unitPrice, taxRateId)
Prisma schema includes CreditNote model (number, invoiceId, date, lines)
Prisma schema includes Quote model (number, clientId, date, expiryDate, status, lines)
Prisma schema includes PurchaseInvoice model (supplierId, number, date, category, status, filePath)
Prisma schema includes Expense model (date, description, amount, category, taxAmount, deductible, filePath)
Migration runs successfully
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: All monetary amounts as Decimal. Status fields as enums. Quote and Invoice share a Line structure.

userStories.title: Seed database with tax rates
userStories.description: As a developer, I need seed data for Spanish IVA rates and international tax scenarios.
acceptanceCriteria: Seed script creates Spanish IVA rates: general 21%, reducido 10%, superreducido 4%
Seed script creates intra-EU reverse charge rate (0%)
Seed script creates extra-EU export rate (0%)
Seed script is idempotent (can run multiple times without duplicates)
npx prisma db seed runs successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create app layout with sidebar navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want a sidebar navigation layout with links to all main sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Root layout with sidebar navigation component
Sidebar links: Dashboard, Fatture, Preventivi, Note Credito, Acquisti, Spese, Anagrafiche (Clienti, Fornitori), Fiscale, Impostazioni
Active link highlighting
Responsive layout optimized for desktop
Main content area with proper padding
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Use Tailwind CSS. Italian language for UI labels.

userStories.title: Company settings page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to configure my company data (name, NIF, address, IBAN, tax regime) so they appear on invoices.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page at /impostazioni with form for company data
Fields: nome, NIF/CIF, indirizzo, città, CAP, paese, email, telefono, IBAN, regime fiscale
Server action to save company data to database
Server action to load existing company data
Basic NIF format validation (8 digits + letter or letter + 7 digits + letter)
Success feedback on save
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Use Zod for validation. Single company record (upsert).

userStories.title: Client list page with search
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a list of my clients with search functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: Page at /anagrafiche/clienti showing client list
DataTable component showing: name, VAT number, country, email
Search input filtering by name or VAT number
Pagination (10 items per page)
Button to add new client
Server action to fetch clients with search and pagination
Soft-deleted clients are excluded from list
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Create a reusable DataTable component.

userStories.title: Client create/edit form
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create and edit clients with all fiscal data needed for international invoicing.
acceptanceCriteria: Form page at /anagrafiche/clienti/nuovo and /anagrafiche/clienti/[id]/modifica
Fields: ragione sociale, partita IVA/VAT, codice fiscale, indirizzo, città, CAP, paese, email, valuta preferita, note
Country selection determines VAT regime automatically (nazionale, intra-UE, extra-UE, UK)
VAT number format validation based on country prefix
Server actions for create and update client
Redirect to client list after save
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: EU country list for intra-EU detection. UK is extra-EU post-Brexit.

userStories.title: Client delete (soft delete)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to delete a client (soft delete) so they no longer appear in the list.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete button on client list rows
Confirmation dialog before deletion
Soft delete sets deletedAt timestamp
Client disappears from list after deletion
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Supplier list and CRUD
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manage supplier records with the same pattern as clients plus expense category.
acceptanceCriteria: Page at /anagrafiche/fornitori with supplier list (reuse DataTable)
Supplier form with same fields as client plus expense category dropdown
Categories: servizi professionali, software, hardware, viaggi, telecomunicazioni, altro
Search and pagination on list
Create, edit, and soft-delete functionality
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Follow same patterns established for clients.

userStories.title: Quote creation form
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create quotes with line items, automatic totals, and progressive numbering.
acceptanceCriteria: Form page at /preventivi/nuovo
Client selection dropdown
Date and expiry date fields
Dynamic line items: description, quantity, unit price, tax rate selection
Automatic calculation of subtotal, tax, and total per line and overall
Progressive numbering format PREV-YYYY-NNN
Server action to save quote with status 'bozza'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Tax rate dropdown populated from TaxRate table.

userStories.title: Quote list and status management
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all quotes and change their status.
acceptanceCriteria: Page at /preventivi showing quote list with DataTable
Columns: number, client, date, expiry, total, status
Status badge with colors: bozza, inviato, accettato, rifiutato, scaduto
Actions to change status (dropdown or buttons)
Link to edit quote (only if bozza)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Invoice creation form with international VAT logic
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create invoices with automatic VAT calculation based on client country.
acceptanceCriteria: Form page at /fatture/nuova
Client selection that auto-determines VAT regime
Date, due date, payment method fields
Dynamic line items: description, quantity, unit price, tax rate
Tax rate auto-selected based on client VAT regime: ES client=21%, EU+VAT=0% reverse charge, EU no VAT=21%, UK/extra-EU=0% export
Currency selection (EUR, GBP, USD) with exchange rate field
Automatic totals calculation
Progressive numbering INV-YYYY-NNN
Server action to save invoice with status 'bozza'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: VAT regime logic is critical: nazionale (ES), intraUE (reverse charge if valid VAT), extraUE/UK (export exempt).

userStories.title: Invoice list and status management
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all invoices and manage their status.
acceptanceCriteria: Page at /fatture showing invoice list
Columns: number, client, date, due date, total, currency, status
Status badge: bozza, emessa, inviata, pagata, scaduta
Actions to change status
Link to view/edit invoice
Filter by status
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Invoice legal disclaimers based on VAT regime
userStories.description: As a user, I want invoices to automatically include the correct legal disclaimers based on the VAT type applied.
acceptanceCriteria: Reverse charge disclaimer for intra-EU invoices: 'Operazione in reverse charge ai sensi dell'art. 196 Direttiva 2006/112/CE'
Export disclaimer for extra-EU invoices: 'Operazione non soggetta a IVA ai sensi dell'art. 21 Ley 37/1992'
Standard Spanish invoice disclaimer for domestic invoices
Disclaimers stored with invoice and visible on detail page
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Disclaimers auto-generated based on client vatRegime when invoice is created.

userStories.title: Convert quote to invoice
userStories.description: As a user, I want to convert an accepted quote into an invoice.
acceptanceCriteria: Button 'Converti in fattura' visible only on quotes with status 'accettato'
Clicking creates a new invoice pre-filled with quote data (client, lines)
New invoice gets next progressive number
Quote status updated to indicate conversion
Redirect to new invoice edit page
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Credit note creation from invoice
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create credit notes linked to existing invoices (total or partial).
acceptanceCriteria: Button 'Crea nota di credito' on invoice detail (only for emessa/inviata/pagata)
Form pre-filled with invoice data, allows removing/adjusting lines for partial credit
Same VAT logic as original invoice
Progressive numbering NC-YYYY-NNN
Reference to original invoice number visible
Server action saves credit note and updates invoice status
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Credit note list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all credit notes in a dedicated page.
acceptanceCriteria: Page at /note-credito showing credit note list
Columns: number, related invoice, client, date, total
Link to view credit note detail
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Purchase invoice registration form
userStories.description: As a user, I want to register purchase invoices received from suppliers.
acceptanceCriteria: Form page at /acquisti/nuovo
Supplier selection dropdown
Fields: supplier invoice number, date, lines (description, amount, tax), total
Expense category selection
File upload for PDF/image of the invoice
Flag for deductible/non-deductible VAT
Server action to save with status 'registrata'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: File stored in local filesystem (Docker volume).

userStories.title: Purchase invoice list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all purchase invoices with filters.
acceptanceCriteria: Page at /acquisti showing purchase invoice list
Columns: supplier, number, date, category, total, status
Filters: by supplier, date range, category, status
Action to mark as 'pagata'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Expense registration form
userStories.description: As a user, I want to register expenses (receipts) not associated with formal invoices.
acceptanceCriteria: Form page at /spese/nuova
Fields: date, description, amount, category, tax amount
Category dropdown: trasporti, pasti, materiale ufficio, telecomunicazioni, altro
Flag deducibile/non deducibile
File upload for receipt photo/PDF
Server action to save expense
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Expense list with filters and totals
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all expenses with filters and period totals.
acceptanceCriteria: Page at /spese showing expense list
Columns: date, description, category, amount, deductible flag
Filters: date range, category, deductible/all
Total amount displayed for filtered results
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: AI data extraction from uploaded invoices/receipts
userStories.description: As a user, when I upload a PDF/image, I want the system to extract data automatically using Claude Vision.
acceptanceCriteria: API route that accepts file upload and sends to Claude API with vision
Extraction of: supplier name, VAT number, date, invoice number, line items, amounts, tax, total
Response returns structured JSON with extracted fields
Matching against existing suppliers by VAT number
Support for PDF (first page) and images (JPG, PNG)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use Anthropic SDK with claude-3-5-sonnet model. Send image as base64.

userStories.title: AI extraction integration in purchase invoice and expense forms
userStories.description: As a user, I want the upload in purchase invoice and expense forms to auto-fill fields from AI extraction.
acceptanceCriteria: When file is uploaded in purchase invoice form, trigger AI extraction
Pre-fill form fields with extracted data
Show confidence indicator or highlight auto-filled fields
User can manually correct any field before saving
If supplier matched, auto-select in dropdown; if not, suggest creating new
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Depends on US-022 API route.

userStories.title: CSV import page for historical invoices
userStories.description: As a user, I want to import historical issued and received invoices from CSV files.
acceptanceCriteria: Page at /import/csv with file upload
Column mapping interface: user maps CSV columns to system fields
Preview of first 5 rows after mapping
Validation of data (date formats, required fields, numeric amounts)
Import creates invoices/purchase invoices and auto-creates clients/suppliers if not found
Report showing imported count and any errors
Toggle between importing issued vs received invoices
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Batch PDF import with AI extraction
userStories.description: As a user, I want to upload multiple PDFs and have them processed in batch by AI.
acceptanceCriteria: Page at /import/pdf with multi-file upload
Queue-based processing with progress bar
Each file processed with AI extraction (US-022)
Review page showing all extracted data before confirm
User can edit extracted data per file
Confirm button imports all reviewed items
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Process files sequentially to avoid API rate limits.

userStories.title: Dashboard with key financial indicators
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dashboard showing revenue, expenses, balance, and overdue invoices.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard at / (home page)
Period selector: month, quarter, year
Card showing total revenue (issued invoices) for period
Card showing total expenses (purchases + expenses) for period
Card showing balance (revenue - expenses)
Card showing count of overdue invoices
List of recent documents (last 5 invoices, purchases)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Dashboard revenue chart
userStories.description: As a user, I want a monthly revenue chart on the dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Bar or line chart showing monthly revenue for current year
Chart uses a lightweight library (e.g., recharts or chart.js)
Responsive chart sizing
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Quarterly VAT report (Modelo 303)
userStories.description: As a Spanish autónomo, I want a quarterly VAT report calculating IVA to pay.
acceptanceCriteria: Page at /fiscale/iva
Quarter selector (Q1-Q4 and year)
IVA repercutida: sum of VAT on issued invoices to Spanish clients
IVA soportada deducible: sum of deductible VAT on purchases
Result: IVA to pay = repercutida - soportada
Correctly excludes intra-EU and extra-EU invoices from domestic VAT calculation
Section showing intra-EU operations summary (for modelo 349)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Critical: only Spanish domestic invoices contribute to IVA repercutida.

userStories.title: IRPF income estimate (Modelo 130)
userStories.description: As a Spanish autónomo, I want an income tax estimate with quarterly payments.
acceptanceCriteria: Page at /fiscale/irpf
Calculation of net income: total revenue - deductible expenses
Quarterly pago fraccionado: 20% of net income for the quarter
Annual summary with total estimated IRPF using Spanish tax brackets
Display of any IRPF withholdings from Spanish clients (if applicable)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: PDF generation for invoices
userStories.description: As a user, I want to generate professional PDF invoices with company details, client info, and line items.
acceptanceCriteria: PDF generation endpoint/action for invoices
Template includes: company logo placeholder, company data, client data, invoice details, line items, totals, legal disclaimers, bank details (IBAN)
Download button on invoice detail page
Multi-language support: select language per document (ES, IT, EN)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use @react-pdf/renderer or similar. Legal disclaimers from US-014.

userStories.title: PDF generation for quotes and credit notes
userStories.description: As a user, I want to generate PDFs for quotes and credit notes with the same professional layout.
acceptanceCriteria: PDF generation for quotes (same template adapted)
PDF generation for credit notes (includes reference to original invoice)
Download buttons on quote and credit note detail pages
Multi-language support matching invoice PDF
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Reuse PDF template components from US-030.

userStories.title: Authentication with login page
userStories.description: As a user, I want the system protected by email/password login.
acceptanceCriteria: Login page at /login with email and password fields
Password hashing with bcrypt
Session management with JWT stored in httpOnly cookie
Middleware protecting all routes except /login
Redirect to /login if not authenticated
Logout functionality
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Single user system. Create initial user via seed or env variable.

userStories.title: Change password functionality
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change my password from the settings page.
acceptanceCriteria: Change password form in settings page
Requires current password verification
New password with confirmation field
Password validation (minimum 8 characters)
Success/error feedback
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: VIES VAT number validation
userStories.description: As a user, I want intra-EU client VAT numbers validated against the VIES system.
acceptanceCriteria: When saving a client with EU country, validate VAT number against VIES API
Show validation status (valid/invalid/service unavailable)
Store validation result with timestamp
If VIES unavailable, allow saving with warning
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: VIES SOAP API or use a REST wrapper. Non-blocking validation.
